_comment: Convention: folder name = character id = image filename (beavis.png). character.json is always the fixed name.
name: Beavis
label: Beavis
_phrase_format_note: Arrays pick one at random. Items may be strings or {parts: string[][]} objects for combinatorial mix-and-match. Tokens: {n} {t} {name} {proj} {msgs} {model} {err} {left} {ok} {missed} {pct}.

init: Heh heh! We're gonna do stuff!
Yeah yeah yeah! This is gonna be cool!
FIRE! FIRE! Wait — export. Heh heh.
I AM THE GREAT CORNHOLIO! I need exports for my bunghole! Heh!
We're doing {n} things! YEAH! Heh heh heh!
{n}?! That's like... a lot! Heh heh heh!
Heh heh heh. Let's DO this.
YEAH! {n} chats! This is gonna be the best day! Heh!
Heh heh. Export. Heh heh. Export. That word is cool. Heh.
fetching: Get it! GET IT! YEAH! Heh heh!
Fetching "{name}"! That sounds cool! Heh heh!
The internet goes WHOOOOSH and downloads stuff! Heh heh heh!
"{name}"! That's like a cool name! Heh!
Heh heh. We are getting the internet right now. Heh.
hasThink: Heh, {n} thinking blocks. I think sometimes too. Heh.
It's thinking SO HARD! Like, more than me! Which is zero! Heh heh heh!
THINKING! {n} BLOCKS! THAT'S LIKE SCHOOL BUT COOL! HEH!
{n} thoughts! That computer thinks a lot! I respect that! Heh heh!
Heh heh. Thinking. I tried that once. Heh.
{n} THINKING BLOCKS! IT'S LIKE IT'S DOING MATH! HEH HEH!
Woah it thought about stuff {n} times. Heh heh. That's smart.
hasArts: Cool! Artifacts are cool! Heh heh heh!
Heh, artifacts. That's a cool word. Heh.
FILES! IT MADE FILES! THAT'S SO COOL! HEH HEH!
{n} artifacts! That's like finding treasure! HEH!
Heh heh. {n} things it made. Heh. That's like art. Heh heh.
ARTIFACTS! Like Indiana Jones! But different! Heh!

Heh heh. Push. Heh. That's a funny word.
Sending to server! YEAH! Heh heh!
HEH HEH! It's uploading! That's cool!
Heh heh. "{name}" is going to the server. Heh.
Heh heh. {msgs} messages. That's a lot of words. Heh heh.
UPLOAD! HEH HEH! UPLOAD IS A COOL WORD!

Heh heh heh. Done. That was cool.
YES! THAT'S LIKE THE GREATEST THING! HEH!

HEH HEH! We are so good at this!

BROKEN! This sucks MORE THAN ANYTHING! Heh.
Ugh, it broke. Heh heh. Broke is funny.

ERROR! HEH HEH! That's not funny. Actually... heh heh.

pushFail: Heh heh server is being a buttmunch.
Server SUCKS! That's not cool! Heh!
Heh. Server rejected it. That's mean. Heh heh.

The server is being a fartknocker. Heh heh.

Retry! That's like, what you do! Heh!
Heh heh. Again. Heh. Again is good.

Almost! THIS IS THE GREATEST DAY! HEH!
Heh heh. {left} left. That's almost zero! Heh!
WE'RE ALMOST THERE! {left} MORE! HEH HEH HEH!
Heh heh. The end is near. Heh. That sounds dramatic. Heh heh.
done_all: YEAH! WE DID IT! HEH HEH HEH HEH HEH HEH!

DONE! IT'S DONE! EVERYTHING IS DONE! HEH HEH HEH!

ZIPPING! That sounds fast! Heh heh!
Like a zipper! But for files! YEAH! Heh heh!

LOG! Heh heh. That's also a word for a big stick.
